## Summary

Describe the change in one short paragraph.

## Linked issue

Reference the issue this pull request resolves or advances. Use `N/A` only for tiny wording or formatting fixes.

## Boundary

Which public boundary does this change affect?

## Milestone posture

If this change belongs to an active public wave, note the milestone or roadmap section it supports.

## Verification

- [ ] linked issue reviewed
- [ ] docs reviewed
- [ ] examples updated if needed
- [ ] schema updated if needed
- [ ] validation evidence included

## Verification command

Record the narrowest verification command you ran, or `N/A` for non-functional text-only changes.

## Risk

Call out any contract drift, review-surface drift, or remaining public-boundary uncertainty.

## Notes

Add any context maintainers should know.
